properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v4 v6 v3 v4

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I'm so blessed, hallelujah, I'm blessed I'm so blessed, hallelujah, I'm blessed

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Trouble knocking at my door today I ain't gonna let it in And worry wanna steal my joy away But I ain't gonna let it win

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: 'Cause on my best day, I'm a child of God On my worst day, I'm a child of God Oh, every day is a good day And You're the reason why

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I'm so blessed, I'm so blessed Got this heartbeat in my chest No, it doesn't matter about the rest If I got You, Lord, I'm so blessed

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: And when I count the problems that I see Hope looks all but gone But when I count the ways You're good to me You got me counting all day long

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: See whether it's your best day, your worst day Just Tuesday, or your birthday Every day's a good day, now let me tell you why If you've got air in your lungs, if you've got blood in your body You are a child of God, come on and sing somebody!
